mcqs.question: What is the correct order of catch blocks when handling base and derived exceptions?

options.text: Any order with proper type checks
Only base exceptions can be caught

mcqs.explanation: Derived exceptions must be caught first to prevent base class catch blocks from handling them

mcqs.question: Which keyword is used to define custom exception classes?
mcqs.explanation: Custom exceptions are defined using class inheritance from std::exception

mcqs.question: What happens when an exception is thrown from a constructor?

options.text: Only base class destructors are called

mcqs.explanation: If constructor fails, destructor isn't called for partially constructed objects
